simp [hm, List.max?_mem hm, List.le_max? hm]
  have h_sub : ∀ s, s ∈ (List.range (2 ^ nums.length)).map (fun mask => (List.range nums.length).foldr (fun i acc => if (mask.shiftRight i).land 1 == 1 then nums[i]! :: acc else acc) []) ↔ s <+ nums := by
    intro s; constructor
    · intro h; obtain ⟨mask, -, hmask⟩ := h; rw [← hmask]
      let f := fun i acc => if (mask.shiftRight i).land 1 == 1 then nums[i]! :: acc else acc
      have : ∀ i, (List.range i).foldr f [] <+ nums.take i := by
        intro i; induction i with
        | zero => simp
        | succ i ih =>
          simp [f]; split_ifs
          · apply List.Sublist.cons; exact ih
          · apply List.Sublist.trans ih; apply List.take_sublist
      have h_take := this nums.length; rw [List.take_all] at h_take; exact h_take
    · intro h; obtain ⟨mask, hmask⟩ := List.exists_mask_of_sublist h; use mask
      simp [Nat.lt_two_pow_of_lt_bits (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mpr hmask.left)]
      induction nums generalizing s mask with
      | nil => simp at h; simp [h]
      | cons x xs ih =>
        obtain ⟨h_mask_bits, h_s_eq⟩ := hmask; simp [List.foldr]
        cases s with
        | nil =>
          have : mask = 0 := by
            simp [List.mask] at h_s_eq; obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := h_s_eq; rw [h1, h2]; simp
          simp [this]
        | cons y ys =>
          simp [List.mask] at h_s_eq
          by_cases h_y : x = y
          · obtain ⟨h_ys, h_mask_even⟩ := h_s_eq
            have h_mask_odd : mask % 2 = 1 := by rw [h_mask_even]; simp
            simp [h_mask_odd]; congr; apply ih; exact ⟨h_mask_bits, h_ys⟩
          · obtain ⟨h_s_ys, h_mask_even⟩ := h_s_eq
            have h_mask_even_bit : mask % 2 = 0 := by rw [h_mask_even]; simp
            simp [h_mask_even_bit]; apply ih; exact ⟨h_mask_bits, ⟨y :: ys, h_s_ys, h_mask_even⟩⟩
  simp [h_sub, List.mem_sublists]
